title: Block Explosion Damage
description: Balances TNT so explosions will damage blocks, requiring multiple explosions to break.
body:
**Mod Release Trailer**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jIBQ9bPIJfM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


---

## Block Explosion Damage

Make Minecraft explosions more strategic! Blocks now require multiple TNT hits to break, and will even heal overtime.

![TNT damage will heal over time.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43f5332e820066597f974f9b4defecea2dbf0c3.gif)

---

**Config System**  
Control how explosions interact with blocks for balanced gameplay:  

- **Set healing speed** for blocks over time.  
- **Adjust default explosion resistance** by multiplying block hardness.  
- **Customize blocks**:  
  - Custom blocks list → individualy tweak explosion resistance of blocks.
  - Protective block list → blocks that don't get destroyed and will protect blocks behind them from explosions.

---

**Commands**  
Manage your TNT balance easily without restarting the game:  

- `/block_explosion_damage reload` → Reload the configuration.  
- `/block_explosion_damage cleardamage` → Reset all TNT damage in the world.

---

**Gamerule Support**  
Enable or disable automatic block healing to suit your needs:  

- `/gamerule tntblockdamagedecay true|false` → Turn block healing on or off.
- (1.21.11+): `/gamerule block_explosion_damage:tnt_block_damage_decay`

---

**Explosion Mechanics**  
Explosions now behave more realistically:  

- **Distance-based damage:** Blocks closer to the blast take more damage.
- **Wider range of destruction:** Allows blocks like obsidian to be broken with enough explosions.
- **Supports all explosion types**, including TNT, creepers, beds, and custom explosions.

![Other explosions like creepers also cause damage.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/191ca91884947b560ffbec02ba401dafdcbca9e3.png)

---

**Server-Friendly TNT Balancing**  
Great for multiplayer and TNT cannons:  

- Prevents one-hit destruction, allowing time for defense.  
- Encourages creative strategies and makes TNT cannons feel more rewarding.

![Works Great with TNT canons!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3793eddaf93427313d32cfed71800346d174ce5d.gif)
